_note: Out-of-scope test. Stick packs are not supported in Phase 1. The Magic Box must detect this format and route to a 'quote manually' message — RFQ row should still be created (status=Draft) but Submit-to-R&D must be disabled.
rawIntakeText: Hydration Stickpack — 8.5g serving — Dextrose Monohydrate, Sodium Chloride, Potassium Citrate (Granular), Citric Acid Anhydrous Fine Granular, Sodium Citrate, Natural and Artificial Fruit Punch Flavor
